components_strategy.buttons: Shadcn Button, customized. Primary: bg-[#064E3B] text-white hover:bg-[#022C22]. Secondary: Outline with border-[#064E3B]. All CTAs link to crm.fns.expert/register.
components_strategy.cards: Cardless or flat cards with 1px subtle border (#E2E8F0) and zero shadow on Light theme. On Dark theme, 1px border (rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) with subtle inner glow.
components_strategy.inputs: Shadcn Input/Select with customized focus ring to brand_primary.
components_strategy.accordion: Shadcn Accordion for FAQ with generous padding and 1px bottom borders.
components_strategy.navigation: Sticky crystal glass header (backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#F4F4F1]/80) border-b border-border/40.

sections_and_content.instructions: Full-width dark section (bg-[#022C22]). Headline: 'AI-сервис ответов на требования ФНС под ключ'. CTA: 'Начать работу' (links to CRM). Trust signals below CTA (500+ processed, 98% satisfied). Include the 'ocr_scanning' image overlapping the bottom edge to create depth.
Section highlighting the risks of ignoring FNS demands (fines, blocked accounts). Use a stark bento layout with red danger accents.
6 steps (PDF upload -> OCR -> AI Analysis -> Lawyers -> Payment -> Response). Use a horizontal or vertical connected path with lucide-react icons.
Showcase types of FNS demands handled (VAT, 6-NDFL, wages, etc.) and AI capabilities. Mix wide and tall cards. Use subtle grey backgrounds for cards against white section bg.
5 tiers. Highlight the 'Бизнес' (10 demands) tier. The popular tier should be slightly elevated and use the dark premium background.
Dark bento box CTA driving to registration.

accessibility_and_testing.data_testids: MANDATORY on all interactive elements (e.g., data-testid='hero-cta-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on dark background meets APCA standards. Hover states must explicitly change text color if background changes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a long-scroll, responsive landing page using Tailwind and Shadcn components.
Do NOT use generic corporate blue. Stick to the Emerald/Stone palette provided.
Add lucide-react icons for visual anchors in the features and how-it-works sections.
Ensure all CTA buttons link to crm.fns.expert/register.
Make sure the typography looks premium - utilize letter-spacing (tracking-tight) for large headers.
The layout must feel asymmetric and modern, avoiding the 'bootstrap template' center-aligned monotony.
